column1: No real changes overnight. Saturday will be a typical August day with impacts from Debby (to be) arriving on Sunday.

Thanks Denis Phillips for keeping us informed. I am an "owner" of a MAJOR grocery company in the southeast that happens to have the best sweet tea and subs around.....lol. Your forecasts help us be prepared to take care of the public and ensure they can get the supplies and food they need during the hurricane season. You are amazing!!!!! Rule #7!!!!
We just had a gallon of that sweet tea at work yesterday. I calculated that there's .77 of a pound of sugar in that gallon. Probably why I couldn't stop drinking it 😂

mile to keep us informed Sir..
